All the education and information given was beneficial
Keep helping people with conditions it’s very helpful to humanity
The instructions. I felt sometimes it was laboured at times on topics a little too much on certain points and leading to having to then  rush on more relevant important times

Would be useful to meet other members of staff
Nathan who took the course was extremely knowledgeable and passionate about his role.
Having a trained facilitator leading each session.
The programme has really encouraged me to realise that I AM THE ONE RESPONSIBLE FOR MY HEALTH AND WELL BEING.
Spending more time in the gym, and learning to use different equipment.
My overall experience was very good, my instructor was really helpful and professional.
Being part of a group and having encouragement to exercise as it is easy to do nothing you are in constant pain
during time covering chapters in the book at the start of each session maybe suggestions for which piece of equipment/exercise is beneficial for certain joint issues
Having the regular sessions already booked in with Katrina encouraging and helping each week.
The room used was effectively a store room.  The sessions and Katrina, the trainer, deserve a more appropriate setting.
I had to take time out of work for the sessions. It would be helpful to have an option outside of working hours.

Really has been a life changing experience. Firstly Laura who runs the course is excellent. She is kind, supportive, knowledgeable, encouraging and clearly cares deeply about her job and how she delivers it. It is very well put together and i think you need the 12 weeks to really address something as complicated and nuanced as chronic pain. This again is dealt with so well by Laura who provides in
It should be better advertised. I was lucky it was my physio who told me but never told by my gp alll the times i have visited for chromic pain
Please see my other comment thank you again
Tutorial at the start of each session
Welcome and atmosphere at the Devonshire is excellent. Thank you
Mental health awareness. Also NH need to ensure there is a more split intake, rather than rolling, so the journey progresses at a sensible pace.

Dropped out as I missed several weeks caring for relative in hospital and became carer for his wife, which was 120 miles away. Due to ADHD / stress, having no contact made me feel I couldn’t return, despite the financial investment in kit.
Initially finding your level of flexibility, balance, stability and stamina and having a measure against other group members.

These first 12 weeks have opened up an array of excersises and disciplines and this has suited my needs, so I believe this initial programme has suited my needs. My next stage is to work on my areas of development.
Group discussions tend to be hijacked by certain members.
The whole programme wzs  very beneficial for me
Instructor was amazing so approachable and encouraging

All aspects Sharon is absolutely amazing. Having the support of someone who understands the pain, limitations of the condition was invaluable. I don't think I would be as motivated to move forward to a new normal way of living without her guidance.
A more balanced mix of meditation, yoga, strength and cardio would be helpful
I am very grateful for the programme
Marcus was brilliant. He motivated us and kept pushing us forward.
The variety of exercises and the support of someone to guide you through.
Maybe have targeted sessions, for knee, back etc.
Markus  has been a great support through the 12 weeks and is very personable in his approach.  He has offered alternative exercises when needed and supported development well.  Thank you :)
Recognition of individual weaknesses in the gym work
TAKING THE SMART ROUTE TO PLANNING  ACTIVITY GOALS AND making sensible changes that work
I ame very please with it
Nothing/ I was very happy with it
I thought the whole programme was perfect for me and I also enjoyed the social interaction with other members of the group
Introduction to the machines in the gym plus the movement exercises.
More time on the movement section.
It has been a great motivation for getting out of the house and meeting others who suffer with pain and want to do something about it. Hopefully we will continue to support one another.

Inclusivity of being surrounded by like-minded peers who understand and resonate with the same or similar daily struggles and experiences that I have endured over the years with my debilitating conditions. It’s been most useful to openly speak and not feel isolated when hearing and discussing similar symptoms. The accessibility of classes and facilities has been rather seamless, and the Group exer

There have been discussions that perhaps once weekly class/program that lasted for 24 weeks as opposed to the biweekly class over 12 weeks would be more motivational to utilise the gym membership. However, I have developed a routine to come in every Wednesday and Friday and will aim to honour that routine over the next 12 weeks.

It has been a privilege and honour to be a part of this experience. I was initially blackmailed by my doctor to attend this program so I had my hesitations, however it has been the best decision for me and I finally feel confident within my body and how to maintain my health conditions through the ongoing support of my peers, the assistance of the informative workbook and most importantly, the kno
Being and making friends with others in a similar situation as myself and being able to talk to Phil the physio therapist twice a week.

Phil, our Physio Therapist, was excellent in this role.  He is kind, caring, fun, funny and non-judgemental.  His knowledge about the body, how it functions and all of the participants different ailments was exceptional.
Exercises to carry out in the gym
More focus on pain management than mental health
There was considerable focus on mental health and I was looking more for pain management; this was addressed in later sessions
It would be good to have a regular session available to joint pain members for example a specific aqua aerobics class which is not as intense as the regular class.

Really helpful to have the group discussions and learn more about the impact of exercise and how this affects mood. I found the booklet very informative and it gave a useful structure to guide weekly discussion.  The best part of the programme was our gym instructor and we were fortunate to have had Sophie and Marvin. They were excellent and very positive in terms of the support and motivation the

Genuinely believe that this a a well designed programme and I think all adults would benefit from the teaching as it really does open your eyes to aspects of pain management that I wasn't aware of before the course. Work on the premise that don't fix anything if it isn't broken.

Sophie was our main instructor and she is very patient and gentle in her approach.  This made attending the sessions such a joy as I felt supported and the group discussions were managed well. Given that we are a diverse group of people Sophie encouraged us to support our colleagues and we built up a lovely friendly team atmosphere.  We have already arranged to meet up regularly outside of the ses
The 2 classes per week were great
This is an excellent programme .. thank you
being in a group; information from course leader and the range of activities
I'm very grateful for the opportunity to take part and feel the programme was really beneficial
It gave me confidence to increase my level of exercise. A lot of things I had stopped doing I now realised we're perfectly safe to do.
I think a little more emphasis on challenge as the course progresses

I didn't feel the approach to the journal was right. I think it needed to be more discussion based. Perhaps brainstorming and sharing experiences. This of course needs someone who is confident in facilitating discussion. Of course there is a lot to fit into an hour. I just think it is beneficial to share experiences with like minded people. It is good to talk.🙂
It is really great for people that start with gym !!
Flexibility on hours i think would help in my opinion. Bringing friends with free pass would help gaining new members but also boost confidence of this who join
Many thanks for personal trainer that bring and boost my confidence in myself. really great program please do not stop
Talks around work book. Being able to try different activities to find something suitable. Social interactions with other participants

Organisation sometimes seems a little muddled as to what we will be doing from one session to the next. Some other participants have not had a review after 12 weeks. Some participants have asked several times about their review and been told they will receive email but have not. It would be useful to be told a bit more about activities which are available ie joint pain aquafit, kick start etc. A l

I am really enjoying taking part. I never thought I would enjoy exercise!  All the staff are very helpful.  I do feel it would be useful if specialist  spent time with each person to find out what they would like to achieve and to help establish a programme of exercise. As people join the programme as different times they can be at different levels and some of the things in the workbook are covere

Both the Monday and Friday sessions were extremely well managed and presented. The progressive increase in intensity has been particularly beneficial, giving me a strong foundation and confidence to continue with the specific exercise programmes independently.

Callum delivered an excellent programme, demonstrating real patience and professionalism throughout. He managed a group with a wide range of abilities with ease, adapting sessions where needed while keeping everyone engaged and progressing. His calm, encouraging approach created a supportive environment that made it easy for everyone to stay motivated and get the most out of each session, thank yo
The fact that you are with other people doing the same thing .
Access to the gym and pool
Temperature of the room we all met in
Having a routine and full access to the gym, swimming pool and classes to make up for the classes I couldn't attend
Would it be possible to be offered heavily discounted membership fees to participants so we can continue using the facilities?
A special mention to Sacha my specialist. She was absolutely brilliant
Confidence to explore exercise activities which may improve my condition

I think there should be off ramps for people who after a few weeks could undertake circuit training or similar by themselves but still be part of the programme of talks at the beginning of the session.

This programme and the continuing use of the gym for another 12 weeks is a valuable benefit which is better than the NHS Physio care I have received for my condition.My concern is how much it would then cost me to continue to be a member of this gym.
The encouragement to try everything available in the programme
The programme is set out for group therapy and not specific to the individual and their particular injury
Mixing up the exercise routines & importance of stretching
Maybe making up missed classes if possible
It was a really good experience. The trainer was excellent
Learning strength exercises and learning how to use equipment in the gym which i enjoyed very much
I was very happy with the course no improvements needed
Varsha at kingston Nuttfield was very good, listened to what areas i wanted to exercise on myself. Varsha was very encouraging, friendly and very knowledgeable in her field .
Access to the various exercise classes
Organisation and delivery of course content

All the PTs, Instructors and ancillary staff at Letchworth are friendly, kind and caring.  The Joint Pain Programme has been an absolute gift and has enabled me to really improve both my mobility, physical fitness and mental wellbeing.
The tutor Lisa was very knowledgeable and extremely supportive
The commitment to exercises throughout the 12 weeks. Following through with some at home. The variety of exercises. The ‘team spirit’ that developed.
I think the pre-exercise talk could be shorter by five minutes; so more time spent on the exercises.
I thought Callum managed us well. Encouraging and yet relaxed in working with old/stiff participants
Meeting new people, I enjoyed the studio sessions and the aqua is great for aching joints
Nothing I found it all very good
Sam has been excellent and I have found the whole course very enjoyable
To cover a bit more, was a slowish pace but I understand it has to cater for all
Being shown & demonstrated exercises to do

My concern is how I will get on now that the program has finished, though I realise that I can attend for 12 weeks & ask for advice etc. from trainers/rehab specialists.  Thank you for providing this programme.

I owe so much to the programme.  I have come so far to understanding my condition and that exercise helps greatly not only in movement but for your mental health. Thank you Helena Pines.  Great inspiration
I have been unable to get onto any other classes, throughout the 12 weeks, all booked up.
The learning and stretches that will benefit me
working on the equipment in the gym. Meeting with the group with same issues
Happy and comfortable. Like to try the pool and other facilities
beautiful introduction into getting into better health

Having someone on hand to help in the gym was so beneficial. It gave me the confidence to keep going which I wouldn’t of been able to do if I was left to my own thing because I didn’t know what to do.
The fellowship of the face to face group members and the kindness and support of Dan our lead instructor

I think that the group shouldn't allow new members to join during the 12 week programme as this often meant we were going back over ground / work that the original members had done, leading to repetition
Other than previous comment, I think that the book accompanying the programme should be used more during the sessions.
Was not given a journal or any interaction with the rest of the group - just met twice a week and did exercises
It was great. Maybe some one to one stuff could be added
Programme was great. It made me come out of the house and go to the gym which i had been avoiding
I was very happy with the whole experience
All staff very friendly and helpful including cafe
The whole programme. In particular the psychology of self care, rest, sleep. The empathy of the facilitator
The programme is extremely well put together.  Thank you for the help.

All. The structure, the support, the variety of tasks and discussions (all very well facilitated), the access to gym and classes. MAXX was an approachable and knowledgeable person I could always ask questions of, group dynamics were managed well. Roll on roll off works. It was all excellent. No one was pushed beyond their capability and all progressed in fitness and confidence. it was a safe and f
Thanks to Maxx, the group and all staff for making the transition back to exercise doable and enjoyable
Guidance by teacher, general advice and specific too with very practical solutions. Confidence to do more. Tips on how to improve overall health on top of joint advie. Encouragement to get an MRI
Our teacher/guide was excellent, very knowledgable, helpful, friendly and approachable.
The structure, the community and equally importantly the passion and energy that Callum brought to the programme
It would be helpful to be able to do the course again or actually have a longer course for 12 months with both class and group exercise but
All of it. The Instructor Justin was very good & inspiring & the exercises were very beneficial.
Justin the Rehabilitation Specialist made the exercises inspiring & enjoyable. I would highly recommend him.
Regular programmed sessions meant I couldn't find excuses not to go.
When the group times changed part way through some of the groups were too big and doubling up didn't work that well.

I enjoyed the sessions and they have certainly helped. Having to commit to the programme was really good as it motivated me to go and then to often stay and do a bit more and be more active on other days.I unfortunately missed the pool session but enjoyed being shown how to use the resistance machines.
The guided exercises. Having not been in the gym for years, it was great to have an instructor telling me exactly what to do and how to do it properly
Our instructor was great, very approachable and knowledgeable
motivation to use gym and swim
Stressing importance of warm up and cool down and to stop exercise if any discomfort

Some of the educatiuonal content is too personal and sensitive for this type of course. There was no set time for warm up and cool down. More stress is needed on the need not to attempt or continue exercise that may aggravate any existing condition
Cardio activity, improving core strength with general muscular improvements through regular exercise
Having expert guidance from a PT
No complaints at all it is a great programme. Thank you!
Programme is brilliant, support is brilliant, gym is brilliant and more importantly I feel so much better. Thank you!
I found the whole programme brilliant. I appreciate that this course works along not only physical health but Mental Health too.
None whatso ever this course is Perfect.

This has been an amazing journey for me. I strongly recommend this. I want to continue to push myself to be a fitter, healthier, me. Moving Helps
Better spacing of classes in the week.Mine were Mon and Wed. Mon and Thurs or Tues and Fri would be better for joint recovery.

After 12 sessions there was a marked improvement in my knee pain.However after then, I had an emergency hospital stay and enforced bedrest and severe restrictions on activities which resulted in a deterioration in the knee ( the inactivity)

Understanding how exercise repairs your body and how important it is for older people to exercise to ensure you age well and prevent things like falls. Our coach was extremely good at explaining the exercises and outcomes and provided a great program for us to follow.
Make it easier to contact at the start to get on the programme

The programme has taught me so much. Our trainer was really excellent and professional. I learned so much from her about how the body works and what I need to do and I am very grateful for the opportunity to take part
More space and equipment during the curcuits there was often more people than stations.

The exercises and the mutual support
It works better for me when the leader does the exercises with us , leading from the front rather than demonstrating and letting us exercise individually
A little better structure of use  the handbook may  help everyone access all the different subjects . As the programme is rolling it felt some topics were missed and some repeated .
None I think it was comprehensive
I think Antony was an excellent trainer and very helpful if you could not understand something
Can’t think of any the programme was great the way it was
No feedback just want to say thankyou as it’s been amazing and didn’t really want to leave the group sessions
Booklet, skilled and patient trainer, regular schedule

1. Great opportunity- thank you 2. But also reflects questionably on nhs, as several participants should clearly have had scans before committing to such a programme. Felt slightly like an nhs workaround
Dylan was exceptionally supportive and friendly, very approahable
Learning the correct way to exercise, and how to adapt to my abilities. Gaining confidence in my mobility, and how to ease joint pain & stiffness.Finding enjoyment in exercise again.
